content.en:
The Xuanxing Eternal List was placed on top of this ancient stone gate, and in an instant, the ancient stone gate opened, forming a huge whirlpool.

Wow!

Ye Tian was sucked into the whirlpool.

......

【Xuanxing Holy Gate Inheritance Assessment Begins】

A voice came from the darkness.

"Xuanxing Holy Gate, which force is this?"

Ye Tian was puzzled.

He didn't know much about it, but since he came, he naturally had to participate in this inheritance assessment.

Soon, the inheritance assessment officially began.

Airplanes!!!

One ray of light condensed, and gradually turned into one figure after another, and the cultivation of each figure reached the half-step Eternal Realm God Realm.

Immediately after, these figures killed Ye Tian.

"Sunrise Domain!"

Ye Tian performed this Eternal Dao Secret Technique, and these figures were directly as if they were frozen.

"One Sixty Zero" "Grip of the Sun!"

"Die!"

In an instant, these figures with the strength of the half-step Eternal Realm God Realm were pinched and exploded by Ye Tian.

It can be said that these figures are too weak.

Congratulations to the examiners for passing the first round of assessment, will the second round of assessment be conducted?

"Proceed!"

Ye Tian shouted.

Rumble!!!!!

The second round of assessment began.

At this time, a large number of figures appeared, and each figure was comparable to the top half-step Eternal Realm God Realm strength, and so many figures were equivalent to a large number of half-step Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouses.

If he held the Eternal Pillar, he could easily sweep through these figures.

However, such an assessment is estimated not to allow the use of such treasures, and he is also worried that if he falls here with something, it will be a pity to lose.

So, let's rely on our own strength to carry out the assessment!

"Kill!"

Ye Tian tried his best to kill these half-step Eternal Realm Divine Realm figures, and one by one the figures were killed by him, but he was also injured by them, and his injuries became more and more serious.

But in the end, Ye Tian still killed all these figures and completely passed the second round of assessment.

Congratulations to the examiners for passing the second round of assessment, will the third round of assessment be conducted?

"Give up the third round of assessments!"

Ye Tian shouted.

He passed the second round of the assessment very reluctantly, and it was impossible for him to pass the third round of the assessment, so there was no need to try.

Just when Ye Tian gave up the third round of assessment, an illusory white woman's figure emerged.

The woman's figure was incomparably huge, and a Qianqian jade hand sent out a white ball of light and a white leaf, which fell in front of Ye Tian.

The next moment.

The woman's shadow dissipated.

"What is this ball of light?"

Ye Tian reached out and grabbed the ball of light and the white leaf.

He passed two rounds of assessments, which should be the reward for two rounds of assessments.

Airplanes!

As soon as Ye Tian touched the ball of light, countless inheritance knowledge poured into his will.

"Xuan Star Realm Snake!"

Through this inheritance, Ye Tian knew that the Eternal Realm Divine Realm wanted to cultivate a realm spirit, and it was not something that could be conceived casually, if there was no realm spirit inheritance, if he just blindly did it, even if he had the Eternal Realm Spirit Fruit, the cultivated realm spirit would only be an ordinary realm spirit.

Moreover, without the inheritance of the realm spirit, the chance of giving birth to the realm spirit is very low.

Like the Xuanze Realm God, even if he did not give birth to the Realm Spirit, if he gave birth to the Realm Spirit, his strength must be very strong, and he could not kill it.

And the Xuan Star Realm Snake is a method of inheritance of the Soul of the Realm, once he breaks through to the Eternal Realm God Realm in the future, he can cultivate the Snake of the Xuan Star Realm and cultivate the Spirit of the Snake Realm of the Xuan Star Realm.

The Xuanxing Realm Snake Realm Spirit is naturally far beyond the ordinary Realm Spirit, and once such a Realm Spirit is cultivated, its strength will inevitably far surpass that of other Eternal Realm God Realms.

"It seems that the Xuanze Realm God also knows that there is a realm spirit inheritance here, so he will come here to participate in the assessment, and it is estimated that he has come more than once, but he has participated in the assessment again and again, and he has not obtained the realm spirit inheritance!"

Ye Tian guessed.

He was able to obtain the Realm Spirit Inheritance, so naturally his personal strength was stronger than that of the Xuanze Realm God.

If there was no Eternal Demon Pillar, he really couldn't be the opponent of the Xuanze Realm God, and the difference in strength was too big.

However, the assessment here should be based on the different assessments set by the cultivation.

Therefore, there is a high probability that the gods of the Xuanze Realm did not even pass the first round of assessment.

"It seems that my luck is really good, this great opportunity of the Xuanze Realm God was obtained by me!" Ye Tian said with a smile.

He also began to look at the leaf, but did not see where it came from.......

Subsequently.

Ye Tian came out of this inheritance place.

......

The ancient stone door closed again, and the Xuanxing Eternal Rod also fell back into Ye Tian's hand.

With this Xuanxing Eternal Rod, he could enter the inheritance land of the Xuanxing Holy Gate at any time.

"It seems that no other Eternal Realm God Realm has entered here, it seems that only the Xuanze Realm God has discovered the Xuanxing Eternal Rod!"

Ye Tian guessed.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian left a replica body to stay here, so that his strength would improve in the future, and he could also participate in the assessment immediately, otherwise if he went out, if he wanted to come in at that time, he would have to wait for this floating realm to border the eternal realm before he could continue to come in.

And Ye Tian's other replica body came out with this white leaf.

After returning to the Endless Realm, Ye Tian used the Eternal God Mirror to identify this white leaf.

Soon, the results came out.

White Pole Xuanye, which can assist in curing the eternal Dao species, and the effect is excellent

Assist in curing the Eternal Dao species!

Ye Tian was a little surprised, this is indeed a good thing!

Subsequently, Ye Tian began to use the White Pole Xuan Leaf to solidify the Eternal Dao Seed, and sure enough, the effect was very good, at least it could increase the effect by several times.

Originally, with the help of the Ruin Sun Solidification Technique, he far surpassed the efficiency of other half-step Eternal Realm God Realm Healing Eternal Dao Species, but now with the addition of the White Pole Xuanye, the effect is even more terrifying.

And.

It seems that the White Pole Xuanye can be used for a long time, and he can hardly sense the effect of the White Technique Xuanye, and it is estimated that after he completely solidifies the Eternal Dao Seed, this treasure will still exist, and it can be passed on to his wife and children at that time.

"What is the origin of the Xuanxing Holy Gate, just a place for assessment, you can take out a treasure like the White Pole Xuanye at any time!"

Ye Tian was very surprised.

Forget about inheritance, after all, it can be sent out ten times or a hundred times once, and there is no loss, but a treasure like Baiji Xuanye is a real treasure, and there will be no more if you send it out.

It can be seen from this that the Xuanxing Holy Gate is definitely extremely rich and powerful.

Of course.

He didn't inquire, and he hardly found out any news here, so when he entered the realm of the Realm God Kingdom in the future, he would slowly understand the Xuanxing Holy Gate!.
